message:
fix: prevent duplicate Mayor spawns during gt up (gt-7m8)

Start() now returns ErrAlreadyRunning immediately when a TMUX Mayor
session exists, instead of falling through to StartTMUX() which could
kill a healthy session during a handoff (when the agent is briefly
undetectable) and spawn a replacement — leaving orphan processes.

The daemon ensureMayorRunning() now handles zombie detection separately
with a 3-cycle debounce to avoid false positives during handoff windows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
